testcase.name: Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › Successful login with OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › Verify OTP during login
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › Verify login placeholders
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Toggle password visibility
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Login without accepting terms
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Invalid email format
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Incorrect password
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Retry login after failed attempt
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Login with invalid OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Forgot Password without entering OTP
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Empty email
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Empty password
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › Both email and password empty
Login Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › OTP shorter/longer than expected
My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Profile Images Flows › 1. User can upload a profile image
My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › 1. Profile fields show data & non-editable
testcase.system-out: First Name value: "EMPTY" First Name non-editable? ✅ Yes Last Name value: "EMPTY" Last Name non-editable? ✅ Yes Email value: "EMPTY" Email non-editable? ✅ Yes Mobile Number value: "401235678" Mobile Number non-editable? ✅ Yes Telephone value: "Telephone" Telephone non-editable? ✅ Yes Job Title value: "EMPTY" Job Title non-editable? ✅ Yes Biography value: "EMPTY" Biography non-editable? ✅ Yes Role value: "Operations Manager" Role non-editable? ✅ Yes Group value: "EMPTY" Group non-editable? ✅ Yes Office value: "QA Tester" Office non-editable? ✅ Yes

testcase.name: My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › 2. PIN field allows input
My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Positive Flows › 3. Correct PIN allows private download
My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › 5. Fields remain non-editable if data missing
testcase.system-out: First Name value: "EMPTY" First Name non-editable? ✅ Yes Last Name value: "EMPTY" Last Name non-editable? ✅ Yes Email value: "EMPTY" Email non-editable? ✅ Yes Mobile Number value: "401235678" Mobile Number non-editable? ✅ Yes Telephone value: "Telephone" Telephone non-editable? ✅ Yes Job Title value: "EMPTY" Job Title non-editable? ✅ Yes Biography value: "EMPTY" Biography non-editable? ✅ Yes Role value: "Operations Manager" Role non-editable? ✅ Yes Group value: "EMPTY" Group non-editable? ✅ Yes Office value: "QA Tester" Office non-editable? ✅ Yes

testcase.name: My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › 6. PIN is required for private download
My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › 7. Verify PIN is required for private download
My Profile Tests - Remmi E2E › Negative Flows › 8. Incorrect PIN prevents private download
